title: Seed real audit note files into vault/shared/audit/
acceptance_criteria: At least 2 Markdown files exist under vault/shared/audit/ with names matching audit-NNN.md.

Each file has YAML frontmatter with all required fields: id (string matching filename without .md), type: audit-note, version: 1, workspace_id (matches a workspace in vault/shared/workspaces/), task_id (matches an existing task in vault/shared/tasks/), message (non-empty string), source (non-empty string), confidence (number between 0 and 1), created_at (ISO 8601 timestamp).
The values in task_id reference tasks that actually exist in vault/shared/tasks/ — no dangling references.
bun test server/services/vault/read.test.ts passes with 0 failures after the files are added (confirming the read model parses them without error).
completion_summary: Seeded three real audit note markdown files under vault/shared/audit and fixed the Kioku seed task locks so the canonical vault parses cleanly in smoke tests.
